Log \#12   
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: add another game mode where there are 5 reels. Reel contents (emojis) are centered only for Mac, but not for Windows and we want it centered for all devices. Implement a file dedicated to test cases of every file used outside of itself to ensure that every function works correctly or handles its specific exception errors correctly. For every function, clearly state and elaborate on the purpose, parameters, and return values (and what those return values mean in the content of the function) in a comment. Add more ways to lose progress than the mask icon.

Observations: 

## **🎯 Iteration 12 — What changed**

### **🎮 New Core Feature**

* **Game modes added**  
  * *3-reel (classic) vs 5-reel (big mode)*  
* Changes:  
  * Reel count  
  * Spin duration  
  * Jackpot requirement (3 vs 5 matches)

---

### **🧠 Logic Upgrade**

* Game now **fully adapts to mode**  
  * Payout rules, reel validation, jackpot logic all scale to mode

---

### **🎛️ UI Changes**

* **Mode selector (like theme picker)**  
* Reels dynamically show/hide based on mode  
* Layout adjusts for 5 reels

---

### **💾 Persistence**

* **Mode is saved** (like theme \+ volume)

---

### **🧪 Tests Added**

* Coverage for:  
  * Game modes  
  * 5-reel logic  
  * Edge cases (invalid reel count, jackpot rules)

---

## **⚡ Net Effect**

* Biggest change so far: **actual gameplay variation**  
* Not just polish → **new way to play (risk/reward shift)**

Validation: 

1. **Error: Non-space characters found without seeing a doctype first. Expected** `<!DOCTYPE html>`**.**  
   [From line 1, column 1; to line 1, column 7](https://validator.w3.org/nu/#l1c7)  
   `:root {↩  --b`  
2. **Error: Element** [`head`](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#the-head-element) **is missing a required instance of child element** `title`**.**  
   [From line 1, column 1; to line 1, column 7](https://validator.w3.org/nu/#l1c7)  
   `:root {↩  --b`  
   Content model for element [`head`](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#the-head-element):  
   If the document is [an `iframe` `srcdoc` document](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#an-iframe-srcdoc-document) or if title information is available from a higher-level protocol: Zero or more elements of [metadata content](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#metadata-content-2), of which no more than one is a [`title`](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#the-title-element) element and no more than one is a [`base`](https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#the-base-element) element.

No CSS errors

Visual:   
![][image1]  
Improvements: 

* Change font to something more dramatic  
* Include spinning animation  
* Big-5 reel doesn’t work

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: change the font of the slot machine game so that it is more relevant to casinos/slot machines and dramatic. For each of the reels, include a spinning animation when the machine is actively rolling. The button for the Big-5 Reel game mode does not work at the moment, so please fix that.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
